calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-28-2012 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-10-2012 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-11-510797 WITH CASE CGC-11-510648
Off Calendar Jul-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MCGRATH ELECTRIC, INC'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASE CGC-11-510797 WITH CASE CGC-11-510648.
Appearances: Kelly L. Huey of the Law Offices of Burke and Kessler (510.444.8100) for plaintiff and moving party; Jennifer M. Schildbach of Lanak & Hanna (714.550.0418 x343) appearing via Court Call for Graybar Electric; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Case 510797 is consolidated for all purposes with Case 510648. Case 510648 shall be the lead case and all further filings shall be in that case only. The trial date for the consolidated cases is October 1, 2012, the date previously set as the trial date for each case. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge Harold Kahn; Not reported

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2012 Continued To Oct-01-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2011 Set For Trial On Apr-02-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
